headline: Citi Maintains Buy Rating on Amcor (AMCR)
summary: Amcor plc (NYSE:AMCR) is one of the 10 Best Affordable Stocks to Buy According to Wall Street Analysts. On May 8, 2026, Citi lowered the firm’s price target on Amcor plc (NYSE:AMCR) to $47 from $54 while maintaining a Buy rating on the shares. The firm described the company’s fiscal Q3 results as better than […]
